Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x415A "BOXINGMANAGER2-415A" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Boxing Manager 2.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $05C2. However the true start address is $415A.
The loading screen is based on the Spectrum version
